title: boechera fernaldiana subsp. vivariensis
intro: Boechera fernaldiana subsp. vivariensis, also known as viviparous rockcress, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it useful for treating respiratory issues, wounds, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Boechera fernaldiana subsp. vivariensis include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting lung health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
